parameters.query:
SELECT
  ah.id,
  ah.alertname,
  ah.severity,
  ah.description,
  ah.instance_role,
  ah.host,
  ah.created_at,
  s.display_name,
  s.system_name,
  EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (NOW() - ah.created_at)) / 3600 AS hours_elapsed
FROM alert_history ah
JOIN systems s ON ah.system_id = s.id
WHERE ah.acknowledged = FALSE
  AND ah.escalated     = FALSE
  AND ah.severity      = 'critical'
  AND ah.created_at   < NOW() - INTERVAL '2 hours'
ORDER BY ah.created_at ASC
LIMIT 20;
